payload.answer: Extracted supported memory takeaways: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; Sam still listens to Bill Evans and lately more early Coltrane; Daniele and Sam plan to catch up about AI infra, and Sam asked Daniele to send the article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No existing entity identifiers were provided; entities are named directly in the transcript.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has lately been listening more to early Coltrane.
Daniele and Sam intend to catch up about AI infrastructure; Sam asked Daniele to send an article.

details: Committed only facts explicitly supported by the transcript.
Preserved the employment change as superseding any prior current-Goldman fact if present.
Did not infer the identity or content of the referenced article.
